prs.title: Migrate Tessie setup and coordinator to tesla_fleet_api
Add keyboard text input services to Apple TV integration
Move OVO Energy DataUpdateCoordinator to separate module
Fix `switch_failed_off` exception wording in `honeywell`
Propagate the in_zones attribute from device trackers in person entities
Migrate peco to use runtime_data
Migrate prusalink to use runtime_data
Update frontend to 20260325.5
Migrate prosegur to use runtime_data
Add new state attribute in_zones to device_tracker
Add Config Flow to Pico TTS
Use runtime_data in ourgroceries integration
Use runtime_data in osoenergy integration
Use runtime_data in opengarage integration
Use runtime_data in ondilo_ico integration
Use runtime_data in openuv integration
Use runtime_data in octoprint integration
Remove deprecated LANnouncer integration
Add multi-plane support for Forecast.Solar integration
Fix propagation of GPS accuracy in person entity
Migrate openhome to use runtime_data
Migrate picnic to use runtime_data
Migrate pushbullet to use runtime_data
Migrate panasonic_viera to use runtime_data
Migrate mutesync to use runtime_data
Migrate nibe_heatpump to use runtime_data
Migrate openexchangerates to use runtime_data
Add reload service to shell_command
Remove redundant field descriptions from triggers and conditions
Use runtime_data in opensky integration
Store received backup in temp backup dir only
Migrate pvoutput to use runtime_data
Use runtime_data in omnilogic integration
Use runtime_data in obihai integration
Rename component to integration in Aruba
Rename component to integration in TEMPer
Rename component to integration in Radio Thermostat
Rename component to integration in Hyperion
Rename component to integration in Hikvision
Rename component to integration in Ubiquiti mFi mPort
Rename component to integration in Pushsafer
Use Tesla Fleet API for Tessie config flow validation
Fix grammar of `input_shutdown_failure` error in `victron_ble`
Make sure we can fetch player stats in Chess.com
Add skeleton with repair issue to bmw integration
Add BEGA brand
Pull out Dropbox integration
Update requests to 2.33.1
Migrate google_mail OAuth token refresh exception handling
Wrap hassio import in is_hassio check in get_system_info helper
Add freshr reconfiguration flow
Rename component to integration in Start.ca
Rename component to integration in SNMP
Rename component to integration in EBox
Rename component to integration in Tomato
Rename component to integration in Denon AVR
Rename component to integration in Actiontec
Rename component to integration in Fido
Rename component to integration in Glances
Rename component to integration in BlinkStick
Rename component to integration in Bbox
Rename component to integration in DNS IP
Rename component to integration in Edimax
Rename component to integration in Denon Network Receivers
Update starlink-grpc-core to 1.2.4
Improve strings in HTML5 integration
Add command compatibility scaffold for Tessie migration
Update mypy to 1.20.0
Migrate nightscout to use runtime_data
Fix spelling of "cannot" in two user-facing strings of `reolink`
Add Off mode support for water_heater entities in HomeKit
growatt_server: implement reconfiguration flow (Gold)
Add coordinator to Anthropic for availability check
Add diagnostics to Anthropic integration
Improve `google_sheets` action naming consistency
Replace NINA attributes with sensors
Improve `system_log` action naming consistency
London Underground integration: Add Tram and IFS Cloud Cable Car status
Update quality scale for Anthropic (documented supported features)
Improve `shelly` action naming consistency
Add firmware update to Ubiquiti airOS
Simplify claude's integrations skill
Fix Proxmox VE backup status sensor false positive due to case mismatch
Add battery sensors to Casper Glow
Fix Tesla Fleet charge current scope handling
Use subentry helper in WAQI
Revert "Pull out Dropbox integration"
Make the Claude's GH reviewer skill a subagent
Fix websocket calling `async_release_notes` in update component although unavailable
Add `html5.dismiss_message` action to HTML5 integration
Improve date action naming consistency
Improve datetime action naming consistency
Improve time action naming consistency
Prevent invalid phase count state in nrgkick
Make field description optional for non config flows
Register trigger platform upon use
Fix StopIteration error in ista EcoTrend coordinator
Register condition platform upon use
Fix Shutdown grammar in Synology DSM strings
Fix "Shutdown" grammar in Roborock strings
Remove calendar and todo from unconditionally loaded integrations
Update hassfest conditions, services and triggers plugins to not require field descriptions
Update frontend to 20260325.4
Add support for energy statistics in waterfurnace integration
Fix one misspelled occurrence of "cannot" in `shelly`
Fix spelling of "cannot" in `local_file` error string
Add --draft flag to raise-pull-request agent PR creation command
Fix select condition state selector
Rename component to integration in Kodi
Fix spelling of "cannot" in `rehlko` exception string
Fix spelling of "cannot" in `azure_storage` exception string
Spelling fixes in user-facing strings of `wiz`
Migrate tilt_ble to use runtime_data
Migrate nuheat to use runtime_data
Patch the correct socket method in SNMP
Fix spelling of "cannot" in `pooldose` exception string
Fix spelling of "Cannot reheat …" in `kitchen_sink`
Add sensor platform for OpenDisplay
Fix lingering tasks in condition and trigger tests
Mark entity-disabled-by-default as exempt in sunricher_dali
netatmo: NDB test addition and camera fix
Fix Tesla Fleet OAuth scope refresh during reauth
Validate set_system_mode params in code instead of by schema for Evohome
100% coverage of services for Alexa Devices
Fix patching for DNS queries in Obihai
Add Claude Code agent for PR creation
Rename component to integration in Linksys Smart Wi-Fi
Rename component to integration in Arris TG2492LG
Add myself to blebox codeowners
Fix lingering tasks in update_coordinator test
Fix ToDo List Intents item casing
Add fan speed percentage control to SwitchBot Air Purifier
Fix spelling of "Shut down" button label in `proxmoxve`
Fix lingering tasks in nest tests
Shutdown debouncer in tests
Improve SNMP tests and avoid dns lookups
Add integration_type to opnsense
Add ConfigEntry method to get subentries by type
Hassfest requirements.py optimization
Update arcam to 1.8.3
Fix Ring snapshots
Add pre-commit hook for copilot instructions
Fix SMHI
Fix asyncio loop scopes for pytest fixtures
Set codeowners for agent configurations
Add missing mHz docstrings
Add millihertz (mHz) to UnitOfFrequency
Adjust git commit guidelines for AI agents
Fix Sonos reporting wrong state when media title is whitespace
